title: bridge-teams: text_body strips only first <at> tag; nested mentions forwarded raw
description: bridge-teams/src/teams.rs text_body: strips only the first '<at>...</at>' block. If Teams sends multiple @mention tags (e.g. group mentions), remaining tags are forwarded to nie as raw XML. Scenario: user types '@Bot @Channel hello' — Teams may send '<at>Bot</at><at>Channel</at> hello', and the bridge forwards '<at>Channel</at> hello' to nie instead of 'hello'.
close_reason: Teams text_body now strips all <at>...</at> spans in a loop
